event_description: I have no reliable knowledge of RXO, Inc. (the truckload brokerage company spun off from XPO Logistics in November 2022) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance disclosure, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure specifically tied to financial-reporting issues. I am not aware of any such event in my training data, but my knowledge only extends through my training cutoff and may not include more recent developments.
